app_info.subtitle: Sourced company dossiers
app_info.description: Company Dossier compiles a complete, source-attributed intelligence file on any company or domain — entirely from public data. One request returns nine sections: overview & identity, people & org chart, hiring radar, money trail, locations, tech fingerprint, news & timeline, relationship web, and risk flags. Every claim is tied to a public source and tagged High/Medium/Low confidence. Built for due diligence, vendor vetting, sales prep, and competitive research. No accounts, no private data — public sources only.

justifications.read_only_justification: build_dossier only reads publicly available information and returns a report. It never creates, updates, or deletes any data on any system.
justifications.open_world_justification: The tool gathers publicly available information from the open web — the company's own website, public DNS records, and public search — so its results come from outside any closed or user-specific account.
justifications.destructive_justification: The tool performs no write or delete operations of any kind. It is strictly read-only and cannot remove, overwrite, or modify any data.

test_cases.description: Direct request to build a dossier on a company by domain.
test_cases.expected_output: A nine-section, source-cited dossier on Stripe (overview, people, hiring, money, locations, tech, news, relationships, risk), each claim attributed to a public source and confidence-tagged.

test_cases.description: Outcome-focused due-diligence request by company name.
test_cases.user_prompt: Do due-diligence research on Acme Robotics before we sign with them
test_cases.expected_output: A sourced nine-section dossier on Acme Robotics, surfacing funding, locations, leadership, tech stack, and risk flags from public sources.

test_cases.description: Sales-prep request emphasizing people and hiring.
test_cases.user_prompt: Who runs Notion and what are they hiring for right now?
test_cases.expected_output: A dossier on Notion that leads with the people & org-chart and hiring-radar sections, with sources.

test_cases.user_prompt: Give me a competitive profile of vercel.com — tech stack, funding, and any risk flags
test_cases.expected_output: A dossier on Vercel highlighting the tech-fingerprint, money-trail, and risk-flags sections, each cited.

test_cases.user_prompt: Research the company at figma.com so I'm ready for a call
test_cases.expected_output: A full nine-section sourced dossier on Figma.

negative_test_cases.description: General-knowledge question unrelated to company research; the tool should not fire.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What's the weather in Tokyo today?

negative_test_cases.description: Creative-writing request; out of scope for the tool.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Write me a short poem about the ocean.

negative_test_cases.description: Translation request; not a company-research task.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Translate 'good morning, how are you?' into French.
